+import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
+import org.springframework.scheduling.annotation.Async;
+import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
+import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
+
+import java.io.InputStream;
+import java.util.List;
+import java.util.Map;
+import java.util.Optional;
+import java.util.function.Function;
+import java.util.stream.Collectors;
+
+/**
+ * 文件上传核心服务
+ * 职责：
+ *   1. 调用 FileValidationEngine 校验文件
+ *   2. 通过 UploadStrategySelector 选择策略
+ *   3. 创建/恢复数据库记录
+ *   4. 委托对应的 UploadStrategyHandler 执行上传
+ *   5. 提供进度查询、暂停/恢复/重试 API
+ */
+@Slf4j
+@Service
+@RequiredArgsConstructor
+public class FileUploadService {
+
+    private final FileValidationEngine validationEngine;
+    private final UploadStrategySelector strategySelector;
+    private final FileUploadRecordRepository recordRepository;
+    private final FileChunkRecordRepository chunkRepository;
+    private final FileRuleProperties ruleProperties;
+    private final MinioConfig minioConfig;
+
+    /** 所有上传策略处理器，按策略枚举索引 */
+    private final List<UploadStrategyHandler> strategyHandlers;
+
+    // ── 初始化上传会话 ──────────────────────────────────────────
+
+    /**
+     * 预检：校验文件 + 决定策略 + 创建/恢复数据库记录
+     * 前端在开始发送文件数据前先调用此接口
+     */
+    @Transactional
+    public UploadInitResponse initUpload(UploadInitRequest req, String username) {
+
+        // 1. 文件校验
+        List<String> errors = validationEngine.validate(req.getFileName(), req.getFileSize(), req.getMimeType());
+        if (!errors.isEmpty()) {
+            String errorMsg = String.join("；", errors);
+            return UploadInitResponse.builder()
+                    .fileId(req.getFileId())
+                    .validationError(errorMsg)
+                    .fileSizeDisplay(FileSizeUtil.format(req.getFileSize()))
+                    .build();
+        }
+
+        // 2. 判断是否断点续传恢复
+        Optional<FileUploadRecord> existing = recordRepository.findByFileId(req.getFileId());
+        if (existing.isPresent()) {
+            FileUploadRecord record = existing.get();
+            if (record.getUploadStatus() == UploadStatus.SUCCESS) {
+                // 已上传完成
+                return UploadInitResponse.builder()
+                        .fileId(req.getFileId())
+                        .strategy(record.getUploadStrategy())
+                        .fileSizeDisplay(FileSizeUtil.format(req.getFileSize()))
+                        .resumed(true)
+                        .uploadId(record.getUploadId())
+                        .build();
+            }
+            // 恢复未完成的上传
+            return buildResumeResponse(record);
+        }
+
+        // 3. 新建上传记录
+        FileCategory category = FileTypeUtil.getCategory(req.getFileName(), req.getMimeType());
+        String bucket = req.getBucket() != null && !req.getBucket().isBlank()
+                ? req.getBucket()
+                : ruleProperties.getBucketFor(category);
+        String objectKey = username + "/" + req.getFileName();
+
+        UploadStrategy strategy = strategySelector.select(req.getFileSize());
+        long chunkSize = strategySelector.getChunkSize();
+        int totalChunks = strategySelector.calcTotalChunks(req.getFileSize());
+
+        FileUploadRecord record = new FileUploadRecord();
+        record.setFileId(req.getFileId());
+        record.setFileName(req.getFileName());
+        record.setFileSize(req.getFileSize());
+        record.setMimeType(req.getMimeType());
+        record.setExtension(FileTypeUtil.getExtension(req.getFileName()));
+        record.setFileType(category);
+        record.setBucket(bucket);
+        record.setStoragePath(bucket + "/" + objectKey);
+        record.setUploadStatus(UploadStatus.PENDING);
+        record.setUploadStrategy(strategy);
+        record.setNodeType(NodeType.FILE);
+        record.setUsername(username);
+        record.setParentId(req.getParentId());
+        record.setChunkSize(chunkSize);
+        record.setTotalChunks(totalChunks);
+
+        recordRepository.save(record);
+
+        return UploadInitResponse.builder()
+                .fileId(req.getFileId())
+                .strategy(strategy)
+                .chunkSize(chunkSize)
+                .totalChunks(totalChunks)
+                .uploadedChunks(List.of())
+                .fileSizeDisplay(FileSizeUtil.format(req.getFileSize()))
+                .resumed(false)
+                .build();
+    }
+
+    // ── 执行上传 ────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+    /**
+     * 接收文件流，异步执行上传
+     */
+    @Async
+    @Transactional
+    public void doUpload(String fileId, InputStream inputStream, String contentType, String username) {
+        FileUploadRecord record = recordRepository.findByFileId(fileId)
+                .orElseThrow(() -> new UploadException("上传记录不存在: " + fileId));
+
+        if (!record.getUsername().equals(username)) {
+            throw new UploadException("无权操作此文件");
+        }
+
+        record.setUploadStatus(UploadStatus.UPLOADING);
+        recordRepository.save(record);
+
+        try {
+            UploadStrategyHandler handler = getHandler(record.getUploadStrategy());
+            handler.upload(record, inputStream, contentType != null ? contentType : "application/octet-stream");
+
+            // 设置 URL
+            String url = minioConfig.getEndpoint() + "/" + record.getBucket() + "/"
+                    + java.net.URLEncoder.encode(record.getStoragePath().substring(record.getBucket().length() + 1),
+                            java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
+            record.setUrl(url);
+            record.setUploadStatus(UploadStatus.SUCCESS);
+            recordRepository.save(record);
+
+        } catch (Exception e) {
+            log.error("[UPLOAD] 上传失败: {} - {}", record.getFileName(), e.getMessage());
+            record.setUploadStatus(UploadStatus.FAILED);
+            record.setErrorMessage(e.getMessage());
+            recordRepository.save(record);
+        }
+    }
+
+    // ── 进度查询 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+    public UploadProgressResponse getProgress(String fileId, String username) {
+        FileUploadRecord record = recordRepository.findByFileId(fileId)
+                .orElseThrow(() -> new UploadException("上传记录不存在: " + fileId));
+
+        if (!record.getUsername().equals(username)) {
+            throw new UploadException("无权查询此任务");
+        }
+
+        return toProgressResponse(record);
+    }
+
+    // ── 上传控制 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+    @Transactional
+    public void pauseUpload(String fileId, String username) {
+        FileUploadRecord record = getOwnedRecord(fileId, username);
+        if (record.getUploadStatus() == UploadStatus.UPLOADING ||
+            record.getUploadStatus() == UploadStatus.PENDING) {
+            record.setUploadStatus(UploadStatus.PAUSED);
+            recordRepository.save(record);
+            log.info("[UPLOAD] 暂停: {}", fileId);
+        }
+    }
+
+    @Transactional
+    public UploadInitResponse resumeUpload(String fileId, String username) {
+        FileUploadRecord record = getOwnedRecord(fileId, username);
+        if (record.getUploadStatus() != UploadStatus.PAUSED &&
+            record.getUploadStatus() != UploadStatus.FAILED) {
+            throw new UploadException("当前状态不可恢复: " + record.getUploadStatus());
+        }
+        record.setUploadStatus(UploadStatus.PENDING);
+        recordRepository.save(record);
+        return buildResumeResponse(record);
+    }
+
+    @Transactional
+    public UploadInitResponse retryUpload(String fileId, String username) {
+        FileUploadRecord record = getOwnedRecord(fileId, username);
+        if (record.getUploadStatus() != UploadStatus.FAILED) {
+            throw new UploadException("只有失败状态的任务可以重试");
+        }
+        record.setUploadStatus(UploadStatus.PENDING);
+        record.setErrorMessage(null);
+        record.setUploadedBytes(0L);
+        record.setUploadedChunks(0);
+        record.refreshPercent();
+        recordRepository.save(record);
+
+        // 删除已有的分片记录，重新上传
+        chunkRepository.deleteByFileId(fileId);
+
+        return buildResumeResponse(record);
+    }
+
+    // ── 内部辅助 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+    private UploadStrategyHandler getHandler(UploadStrategy strategy) {
+        return strategyHandlers.stream()
+                .filter(h -> h.getStrategy() == strategy)
+                .findFirst()
+                .orElseThrow(() -> new UploadException("找不到上传策略处理器: " + strategy));
+    }
+
+    private FileUploadRecord getOwnedRecord(String fileId, String username) {
+        FileUploadRecord record = recordRepository.findByFileId(fileId)
+                .orElseThrow(() -> new UploadException("上传记录不存在: " + fileId));
+        if (!record.getUsername().equals(username)) {
+            throw new UploadException("无权操作此文件");
+        }
+        return record;
+    }
+
+    private UploadInitResponse buildResumeResponse(FileUploadRecord record) {
+        List<Integer> uploadedChunkIndexes = chunkRepository
+                .findByFileIdAndStatus(record.getFileId(), UploadStatus.SUCCESS)
+                .stream()
+                .map(FileChunkRecord::getChunkIndex)
+                .collect(Collectors.toList());
+
+        return UploadInitResponse.builder()
+                .fileId(record.getFileId())
+                .strategy(record.getUploadStrategy())
+                .chunkSize(record.getChunkSize())
+                .totalChunks(record.getTotalChunks())
+                .uploadedChunks(uploadedChunkIndexes)
+                .uploadId(record.getUploadId())
+                .fileSizeDisplay(FileSizeUtil.format(record.getFileSize()))
+                .resumed(true)
+                .build();
+    }
+
+    private UploadProgressResponse toProgressResponse(FileUploadRecord record) {
+        return UploadProgressResponse.builder()
+                .fileId(record.getFileId())
+                .fileName(record.getFileName())
+                .status(record.getUploadStatus())
+                .strategy(record.getUploadStrategy())
+                .totalBytes(record.getFileSize())
+                .uploadedBytes(record.getUploadedBytes())
+                .uploadPercent(record.getUploadPercent())
+                .totalChunks(record.getTotalChunks())
+                .uploadedChunks(record.getUploadedChunks())
+                .url(record.getUrl())
+                .errorMessage(record.getErrorMessage())
+                .fileSizeDisplay(FileSizeUtil.format(record.getFileSize()))
+                .createdAt(record.getCreatedAt())
+                .updatedAt(record.getUpdatedAt())
+                .build();
+    }
+}

+package com.minio.fileservice.service.strategy;
+
+import com.minio.fileservice.entity.FileUploadRecord;
+import com.minio.fileservice.enums.UploadStatus;
+import com.minio.fileservice.enums.UploadStrategy;
+import com.minio.fileservice.repository.FileUploadRecordRepository;
+import io.minio.MinioClient;
+import io.minio.PutObjectArgs;
+import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
+import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
+import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
+
+import java.io.ByteArrayInputStream;
+import java.io.InputStream;
+
+/**
+ * 直接上传策略（< 1 MB）
+ * 将文件读入内存后一次性 PUT 到 MinIO
+ */
+@Slf4j
+@Component
+@RequiredArgsConstructor
+public class DirectUploadStrategy implements UploadStrategyHandler {
+
+    private final MinioClient minioClient;
+    private final FileUploadRecordRepository recordRepository;
+
+    @Override
+    public UploadStrategy getStrategy() {
+        return UploadStrategy.DIRECT;
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void upload(FileUploadRecord record, InputStream inputStream, String contentType) throws Exception {
+        log.debug("[DIRECT] 开始上传: {}, 大小: {} 字节", record.getFileName(), record.getFileSize());
+
+        byte[] data = inputStream.readAllBytes();
+
+        minioClient.putObject(
+            PutObjectArgs.builder()
+                .bucket(record.getBucket())
+                .object(record.getStoragePath().substring(record.getBucket().length() + 1))
+                .stream(new ByteArrayInputStream(data), data.length, -1)
+                .contentType(contentType)
+                .build()
+        );
+
+        record.setUploadedBytes((long) data.length);
+        record.refreshPercent();
+        record.setUploadStatus(UploadStatus.SUCCESS);
+        recordRepository.save(record);
+
+        log.info("[DIRECT] 上传完成: {}", record.getFileName());
+    }
+}

--- file-service/src/main/java/com/minio/fileservice/service/strategy/MultipartUploadStrategy.java	
+++ file-service/src/main/java/com/minio/fileservice/service/strategy/MultipartUploadStrategy.java	
@@ -0,0 +1,136 @@
+package com.minio.fileservice.service.strategy;
+
+import com.minio.fileservice.entity.FileChunkRecord;
+import com.minio.fileservice.entity.FileUploadRecord;
+import com.minio.fileservice.enums.UploadStatus;
+import com.minio.fileservice.enums.UploadStrategy;
+import com.minio.fileservice.repository.FileChunkRecordRepository;
+import com.minio.fileservice.repository.FileUploadRecordRepository;
+import io.minio.*;
+import io.minio.messages.Part;
+import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
+import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
+import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
+
+import java.io.ByteArrayInputStream;
+import java.io.InputStream;
+import java.time.OffsetDateTime;
+import java.util.ArrayList;
+import java.util.List;
+
+/**
+ * 分片上传策略（10 MB ~ 100 MB）
+ * 将文件切分为多个分片，逐个上传到 MinIO
+ */
+@Slf4j
+@Component
+@RequiredArgsConstructor
+public class MultipartUploadStrategy implements UploadStrategyHandler {
+
+    private final MinioClient minioClient;
+    private final FileUploadRecordRepository recordRepository;
+    private final FileChunkRecordRepository chunkRepository;
+
+    @Override
+    public UploadStrategy getStrategy() {
+        return UploadStrategy.MULTIPART;
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void upload(FileUploadRecord record, InputStream inputStream, String contentType) throws Exception {
+        log.debug("[MULTIPART] 开始分片上传: {}, 大小: {} 字节, 分片数: {}",
+                record.getFileName(), record.getFileSize(), record.getTotalChunks());
+
+        String objectName = record.getStoragePath().substring(record.getBucket().length() + 1);
+
+        // 1. 创建 Multipart Upload
+        CreateMultipartUploadResponse multipart = minioClient.createMultipartUpload(
+            CreateMultipartUploadArgs.builder()
+                .bucket(record.getBucket())
+                .object(objectName)
+                .contentType(contentType)
+                .build()
+        );
+
+        String uploadId = multipart.result().uploadId();
+        record.setUploadId(uploadId);
+        recordRepository.save(record);
+
+        List<Part> parts = new ArrayList<>();
+        byte[] buffer = new byte[(int) record.getChunkSize()];
+        int chunkIndex = 1;
+        int bytesRead;
+
+        try {
+            while ((bytesRead = inputStream.read(buffer)) > 0) {
+                byte[] chunkData = (bytesRead == buffer.length) ? buffer : java.util.Arrays.copyOf(buffer, bytesRead);
+
+                // 上传分片
+                UploadPartResponse partResponse = minioClient.uploadPart(
+                    UploadPartArgs.builder()
+                        .bucket(record.getBucket())
+                        .object(objectName)
+                        .uploadId(uploadId)
+                        .partNumber(chunkIndex)
+                        .stream(new ByteArrayInputStream(chunkData), chunkData.length, -1)
+                        .build()
+                );
+
+                String etag = partResponse.etag();
+                parts.add(new Part(chunkIndex, etag));
+
+                // 保存分片记录
+                FileChunkRecord chunk = new FileChunkRecord();
+                chunk.setFileId(record.getFileId());
+                chunk.setChunkIndex(chunkIndex);
+                chunk.setChunkSize((long) bytesRead);
+                chunk.setEtag(etag);
+                chunk.setStatus(UploadStatus.SUCCESS);
+                chunk.setUploadedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
+                chunkRepository.save(chunk);
+
+                // 更新进度
+                record.setUploadedChunks(chunkIndex);
+                record.setUploadedBytes(record.getUploadedBytes() + bytesRead);
+                record.refreshPercent();
+                recordRepository.save(record);
+
+                log.debug("[MULTIPART] 分片 {}/{} 上传完成", chunkIndex, record.getTotalChunks());
+                chunkIndex++;
+            }
+
+            // 2. 完成 Multipart Upload
+            minioClient.completeMultipartUpload(
+                CompleteMultipartUploadArgs.builder()
+                    .bucket(record.getBucket())
+                    .object(objectName)
+                    .uploadId(uploadId)
+                    .parts(parts.toArray(new Part[0]))
+                    .build()
+            );
+
+            record.setUploadStatus(UploadStatus.SUCCESS);
+            record.setUploadedBytes(record.getFileSize());
+            record.refreshPercent();
+            recordRepository.save(record);
+
+            log.info("[MULTIPART] 上传完成: {}, 共 {} 个分片", record.getFileName(), parts.size());
+
+        } catch (Exception e) {
+            log.error("[MULTIPART] 上传失败: {}", record.getFileName(), e);
+            // 失败时中止 Multipart Upload
+            try {
+                minioClient.abortMultipartUpload(
+                    AbortMultipartUploadArgs.builder()
+                        .bucket(record.getBucket())
+                        .object(objectName)
+                        .uploadId(uploadId)
+                        .build()
+                );
+            } catch (Exception abortEx) {
+                log.warn("[MULTIPART] 中止上传失败", abortEx);
+            }
+            throw e;
+        }
+    }
+}

--- file-service/src/main/java/com/minio/fileservice/service/strategy/ProgressTrackingInputStream.java

+package com.minio.fileservice.service.strategy;
+
+import java.io.IOException;
+import java.io.InputStream;
+import java.util.function.Consumer;
+
+/**
+ * 进度追踪输入流包装器
+ * 每读取 REPORT_INTERVAL 字节回调一次，用于更新数据库进度
+ */
+public class ProgressTrackingInputStream extends InputStream {
+
+    /** 每读取 512 KB 回调一次进度，平衡性能与实时性 */
+    private static final int REPORT_INTERVAL = 512 * 1024;
+
+    private final InputStream delegate;
+    private final long totalBytes;
+    private final Consumer<Long> progressCallback;
+    private long uploadedBytes = 0;
+    private long lastReported = 0;
+
+    public ProgressTrackingInputStream(InputStream delegate, long totalBytes,
+                                       Consumer<Long> progressCallback) {
+        this.delegate = delegate;
+        this.totalBytes = totalBytes;
+        this.progressCallback = progressCallback;
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public int read() throws IOException {
+        int b = delegate.read();
+        if (b != -1) {
+            uploadedBytes++;
+            maybeReport();
+        }
+        return b;
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public int read(byte[] buf, int off, int len) throws IOException {
+        int n = delegate.read(buf, off, len);
+        if (n > 0) {
+            uploadedBytes += n;
+            maybeReport();
+        }
+        return n;
+    }
+
+    private void maybeReport() {
+        if (uploadedBytes - lastReported >= REPORT_INTERVAL
+                || uploadedBytes >= totalBytes) {
+            progressCallback.accept(uploadedBytes);
+            lastReported = uploadedBytes;
+        }
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void close() throws IOException {
+        delegate.close();
+    }
+}

--- file-service/src/main/java/com/minio/fileservice/service/strategy/ResumableUploadStrategy.java	
+++ file-service/src/main/java/com/minio/fileservice/service/strategy/ResumableUploadStrategy.java	
@@ -0,0 +1,153 @@
+package com.minio.fileservice.service.strategy;
+
+import com.minio.fileservice.entity.FileChunkRecord;
+import com.minio.fileservice.entity.FileUploadRecord;
+import com.minio.fileservice.enums.UploadStatus;
+import com.minio.fileservice.enums.UploadStrategy;
+import com.minio.fileservice.repository.FileChunkRecordRepository;
+import com.minio.fileservice.repository.FileUploadRecordRepository;
+import io.minio.*;
+import io.minio.messages.Part;
+import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
+import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
+import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
+
+import java.io.ByteArrayInputStream;
+import java.io.InputStream;
+import java.time.OffsetDateTime;
+import java.util.ArrayList;
+import java.util.List;
+import java.util.Set;
+import java.util.stream.Collectors;
+
+/**
+ * 断点续传策略（100 MB ~ 1 GB）
+ * 支持暂停/恢复：从数据库读取已上传分片，跳过已完成的部分
+ */
+@Slf4j
+@Component
+@RequiredArgsConstructor
+public class ResumableUploadStrategy implements UploadStrategyHandler {
+
+    private final MinioClient minioClient;
+    private final FileUploadRecordRepository recordRepository;
+    private final FileChunkRecordRepository chunkRepository;
+
+    @Override
+    public UploadStrategy getStrategy() {
+        return UploadStrategy.RESUMABLE;
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void upload(FileUploadRecord record, InputStream inputStream, String contentType) throws Exception {
+        log.debug("[RESUMABLE] 开始断点续传: {}, 大小: {} 字节, 分片数: {}",
+                record.getFileName(), record.getFileSize(), record.getTotalChunks());
+
+        String objectName = record.getStoragePath().substring(record.getBucket().length() + 1);
+        String uploadId = record.getUploadId();
+
+        // 如果没有 uploadId，创建新的 Multipart Upload
+        if (uploadId == null || uploadId.isBlank()) {
+            CreateMultipartUploadResponse multipart = minioClient.createMultipartUpload(
+                CreateMultipartUploadArgs.builder()
+                    .bucket(record.getBucket())
+                    .object(objectName)
+                    .contentType(contentType)
+                    .build()
+            );
+            uploadId = multipart.result().uploadId();
+            record.setUploadId(uploadId);
+            recordRepository.save(record);
+        }
+
+        // 查询已上传的分片
+        List<FileChunkRecord> existingChunks = chunkRepository.findByFileIdAndStatus(
+                record.getFileId(), UploadStatus.SUCCESS);
+        Set<Integer> uploadedIndexes = existingChunks.stream()
+                .map(FileChunkRecord::getChunkIndex)
+                .collect(Collectors.toSet());
+
+        log.debug("[RESUMABLE] 已上传分片: {}", uploadedIndexes);
+
+        List<Part> parts = new ArrayList<>();
+        // 恢复已上传的分片信息
+        for (FileChunkRecord chunk : existingChunks) {
+            parts.add(new Part(chunk.getChunkIndex(), chunk.getEtag()));
+        }
+
+        byte[] buffer = new byte[(int) record.getChunkSize()];
+        int chunkIndex = 1;
+        int bytesRead;
+        long skippedBytes = 0;
+
+        try {
+            while ((bytesRead = inputStream.read(buffer)) > 0) {
+                // 跳过已上传的分片
+                if (uploadedIndexes.contains(chunkIndex)) {
+                    log.debug("[RESUMABLE] 跳过已上传分片 {}", chunkIndex);
+                    skippedBytes += bytesRead;
+                    chunkIndex++;
+                    continue;
+                }
+
+                byte[] chunkData = (bytesRead == buffer.length) ? buffer : java.util.Arrays.copyOf(buffer, bytesRead);
+
+                // 上传分片
+                UploadPartResponse partResponse = minioClient.uploadPart(
+                    UploadPartArgs.builder()
+                        .bucket(record.getBucket())
+                        .object(objectName)
+                        .uploadId(uploadId)
+                        .partNumber(chunkIndex)
+                        .stream(new ByteArrayInputStream(chunkData), chunkData.length, -1)
+                        .build()
+                );
+
+                String etag = partResponse.etag();
+                parts.add(new Part(chunkIndex, etag));
+
+                // 保存分片记录
+                FileChunkRecord chunk = new FileChunkRecord();
+                chunk.setFileId(record.getFileId());
+                chunk.setChunkIndex(chunkIndex);
+                chunk.setChunkSize((long) bytesRead);
+                chunk.setEtag(etag);
+                chunk.setStatus(UploadStatus.SUCCESS);
+                chunk.setUploadedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
+                chunkRepository.save(chunk);
+
+                // 更新进度
+                record.setUploadedChunks(record.getUploadedChunks() + 1);
+                record.setUploadedBytes(skippedBytes + record.getUploadedBytes() + bytesRead);
+                record.refreshPercent();
+                recordRepository.save(record);
+
+                log.debug("[RESUMABLE] 分片 {}/{} 上传完成", chunkIndex, record.getTotalChunks());
+                chunkIndex++;
+            }
+
+            // 完成 Multipart Upload
+            minioClient.completeMultipartUpload(
+                CompleteMultipartUploadArgs.builder()
+                    .bucket(record.getBucket())
+                    .object(objectName)
+                    .uploadId(uploadId)
+                    .parts(parts.toArray(new Part[0]))
+                    .build()
+            );
+
+            record.setUploadStatus(UploadStatus.SUCCESS);
+            record.setUploadedBytes(record.getFileSize());
+            record.refreshPercent();
+            recordRepository.save(record);
+
+            log.info("[RESUMABLE] 断点续传完成: {}, 共 {} 个分片", record.getFileName(), parts.size());
+
+        } catch (Exception e) {
+            log.error("[RESUMABLE] 上传失败: {}", record.getFileName(), e);
+            record.setUploadStatus(UploadStatus.PAUSED);
+            recordRepository.save(record);
+            throw e;
+        }
+    }
+}

+package com.minio.fileservice.service.strategy;
+
+import com.minio.fileservice.entity.FileUploadRecord;
+import com.minio.fileservice.enums.UploadStatus;
+import com.minio.fileservice.enums.UploadStrategy;
+import com.minio.fileservice.repository.FileUploadRecordRepository;
+import io.minio.MinioClient;
+import io.minio.PutObjectArgs;
+import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
+import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
+import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
+
+import java.io.InputStream;
+
+/**
+ * 普通 HTTP 上传策略（1 MB ~ 10 MB）
+ * 流式传输，MinIO SDK 内部处理缓冲；每次读取 512KB 更新进度
+ */
+@Slf4j
+@Component
+@RequiredArgsConstructor
+public class SimpleUploadStrategy implements UploadStrategyHandler {
+
+    private final MinioClient minioClient;
+    private final FileUploadRecordRepository recordRepository;
+
+    @Override
+    public UploadStrategy getStrategy() {
+        return UploadStrategy.SIMPLE;
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void upload(FileUploadRecord record, InputStream inputStream, String contentType) throws Exception {
+        log.debug("[SIMPLE] 开始上传: {}, 大小: {} 字节", record.getFileName(), record.getFileSize());
+
+        String objectName = record.getStoragePath().substring(record.getBucket().length() + 1);
+
+        // 使用进度追踪包装流
+        ProgressTrackingInputStream trackingStream = new ProgressTrackingInputStream(
+                inputStream, record.getFileSize(),
+                (uploadedBytes) -> {
+                    record.setUploadedBytes(uploadedBytes);
+                    record.refreshPercent();
+                    recordRepository.save(record);
+                }
+        );
+
+        minioClient.putObject(
+            PutObjectArgs.builder()
+                .bucket(record.getBucket())
+                .object(objectName)
+                .stream(trackingStream, record.getFileSize(), -1)
+                .contentType(contentType)
+                .build()
+        );
+
+        record.setUploadedBytes(record.getFileSize());
+        record.refreshPercent();
+        record.setUploadStatus(UploadStatus.SUCCESS);
+        recordRepository.save(record);
+
+        log.info("[SIMPLE] 上传完成: {}", record.getFileName());
+    }
+}

===================================================================
--- file-service/src/main/java/com/minio/fileservice/service/strategy/StreamingUploadStrategy.java	
+++ file-service/src/main/java/com/minio/fileservice/service/strategy/StreamingUploadStrategy.java	
@@ -0,0 +1,166 @@
+package com.minio.fileservice.service.strategy;
+
+import com.minio.fileservice.entity.FileChunkRecord;
+import com.minio.fileservice.entity.FileUploadRecord;
+import com.minio.fileservice.enums.UploadStatus;
+import com.minio.fileservice.enums.UploadStrategy;
+import com.minio.fileservice.repository.FileChunkRecordRepository;
+import com.minio.fileservice.repository.FileUploadRecordRepository;
+import io.minio.*;
+import io.minio.messages.Part;
+import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
+import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
+import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
+
+import java.io.ByteArrayInputStream;
+import java.io.InputStream;
+import java.time.OffsetDateTime;
+import java.util.ArrayList;
+import java.util.List;
+import java.util.concurrent.*;
+import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicLong;
+
+/**
+ * 流式上传策略（> 1 GB）
+ * 多线程并发读取流并分片上传到 MinIO，最大化带宽利用率
+ * 使用固定线程池控制并发数，通过 BlockingQueue 协调读取和上传
+ */
+@Slf4j
+@Component
+@RequiredArgsConstructor
+public class StreamingUploadStrategy implements UploadStrategyHandler {
+
+    private final MinioClient minioClient;
+    private final FileUploadRecordRepository recordRepository;
+    private final FileChunkRecordRepository chunkRepository;
+    private final com.minio.fileservice.config.UploadStrategyProperties strategyProperties;
+
+    @Override
+    public UploadStrategy getStrategy() {
+        return UploadStrategy.STREAMING;
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void upload(FileUploadRecord record, InputStream inputStream, String contentType) throws Exception {
+        log.debug("[STREAMING] 开始流式上传: {}, 大小: {} 字节, 线程数: {}",
+                record.getFileName(), record.getFileSize(), strategyProperties.getStreamingThreads());
+
+        String objectName = record.getStoragePath().substring(record.getBucket().length() + 1);
+
+        // 创建 Multipart Upload
+        CreateMultipartUploadResponse multipart = minioClient.createMultipartUpload(
+            CreateMultipartUploadArgs.builder()
+                .bucket(record.getBucket())
+                .object(objectName)
+                .contentType(contentType)
+                .build()
+        );
+        String uploadId = multipart.result().uploadId();
+        record.setUploadId(uploadId);
+        recordRepository.save(record);
+
+        int threads = strategyProperties.getStreamingThreads();
+        int chunkSize = (int) record.getChunkSize();
+
+        // 线程池 + 结果收集
+        ExecutorService executor = Executors.newFixedThreadPool(threads);
+        List<Future<Part>> futures = new ArrayList<>();
+        List<Part> parts = new ArrayList<>();
+
+        AtomicLong uploadedBytes = new AtomicLong(0);
+        int chunkIndex = 1;
+
+        try {
+            // 读取流，将分片提交给线程池并行上传
+            byte[] buffer = new byte[chunkSize];
+            int bytesRead;
+            final String finalUploadId = uploadId;
+
+            while ((bytesRead = inputStream.read(buffer)) > 0) {
+                final byte[] chunkData = (bytesRead == buffer.length)
+                        ? buffer.clone()
+                        : java.util.Arrays.copyOf(buffer, bytesRead);
+                final int partNum = chunkIndex;
+                final String bucket = record.getBucket();
+                final long chunkLen = bytesRead;
+
+                Future<Part> future = executor.submit(() -> {
+                    UploadPartResponse partResponse = minioClient.uploadPart(
+                        UploadPartArgs.builder()
+                            .bucket(bucket)
+                            .object(objectName)
+                            .uploadId(finalUploadId)
+                            .partNumber(partNum)
+                            .stream(new ByteArrayInputStream(chunkData), chunkLen, -1)
+                            .build()
+                    );
+
+                    long total = uploadedBytes.addAndGet(chunkLen);
+                    record.setUploadedBytes(total);
+                    record.refreshPercent();
+                    recordRepository.save(record);
+
+                    // 保存分片记录
+                    FileChunkRecord chunk = new FileChunkRecord();
+                    chunk.setFileId(record.getFileId());
+                    chunk.setChunkIndex(partNum);
+                    chunk.setChunkSize(chunkLen);
+                    chunk.setEtag(partResponse.etag());
+                    chunk.setStatus(UploadStatus.SUCCESS);
+                    chunk.setUploadedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
+                    chunkRepository.save(chunk);
+
+                    log.debug("[STREAMING] 分片 {} 上传完成", partNum);
+                    return new Part(partNum, partResponse.etag());
+                });
+
+                futures.add(future);
+                chunkIndex++;
+            }
+
+            // 等待所有分片完成
+            for (Future<Part> f : futures) {
+                parts.add(f.get());
+            }
+
+            // 按分片序号排序后完成上传
+            parts.sort(java.util.Comparator.comparingInt(Part::partNumber));
+
+            minioClient.completeMultipartUpload(
+                CompleteMultipartUploadArgs.builder()
+                    .bucket(record.getBucket())
+                    .object(objectName)
+                    .uploadId(uploadId)
+                    .parts(parts.toArray(new Part[0]))
+                    .build()
+            );
+
+            record.setUploadedChunks(parts.size());
+            record.setUploadStatus(UploadStatus.SUCCESS);
+            record.setUploadedBytes(record.getFileSize());
+            record.refreshPercent();
+            recordRepository.save(record);
+
+            log.info("[STREAMING] 流式上传完成: {}, 共 {} 个分片", record.getFileName(), parts.size());
+
+        } catch (Exception e) {
+            log.error("[STREAMING] 上传失败: {}", record.getFileName(), e);
+            executor.shutdownNow();
+            // 中止 Multipart Upload
+            try {
+                minioClient.abortMultipartUpload(
+                    AbortMultipartUploadArgs.builder()
+                        .bucket(record.getBucket())
+                        .object(objectName)
+                        .uploadId(uploadId)
+                        .build()
+                );
+            } catch (Exception abortEx) {
+                log.warn("[STREAMING] 中止上传失败", abortEx);
+            }
+            throw e;
+        } finally {
+            executor.shutdown();
+        }
+    }
+}

+package com.minio.fileservice.service.strategy;
+
+import com.minio.fileservice.entity.FileUploadRecord;
+import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
+
+import java.io.InputStream;
+
+/**
+ * 文件上传策略接口（Strategy 模式）
+ *
+ * 五种实现：
+ *   DirectUploadStrategy   < 1 MB    内存直传
+ *   SimpleUploadStrategy   1–10 MB   普通流式上传
+ *   MultipartUploadStrategy 10–100 MB 分片上传
+ *   ResumableUploadStrategy 100MB–1GB 分片 + 断点续传
+ *   StreamingUploadStrategy > 1 GB   流式 + 多线程分片
+ */
+public interface UploadStrategyHandler {
+
+    /**
+     * 执行上传
+     * @param record    数据库中的上传记录（uploadId、bucket、username 等已填充）
+     * @param inputStream 文件输入流
+     * @param contentType MIME 类型
+     */
+    void upload(FileUploadRecord record, InputStream inputStream, String contentType) throws Exception;
+
+    /**
+     * 支持的策略名称（对应 UploadStrategy 枚举）
+     */
+    com.minio.fileservice.enums.UploadStrategy getStrategy();
+}

+package com.minio.fileservice.service.strategy;
+
+import com.minio.fileservice.config.UploadStrategyProperties;
+import com.minio.fileservice.enums.UploadStrategy;
+import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
+import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
+
+/**
+ * 上传策略选择器
+ * 根据文件大小决定使用哪种上传策略
+ */
+@Component
+@RequiredArgsConstructor
+public class UploadStrategySelector {
+
+    private final UploadStrategyProperties props;
+
+    /**
+     * 根据文件大小选择上传策略
+     * @param fileSize 文件字节数
+     * @return 对应策略枚举
+     */
+    public UploadStrategy select(long fileSize) {
+        if (fileSize < props.getDirectThreshold()) {
+            return UploadStrategy.DIRECT;
+        } else if (fileSize < props.getSimpleThreshold()) {
+            return UploadStrategy.SIMPLE;
+        } else if (fileSize < props.getMultipartThreshold()) {
+            return UploadStrategy.MULTIPART;
+        } else if (fileSize < props.getResumableThreshold()) {
+            return UploadStrategy.RESUMABLE;
+        } else {
+            return UploadStrategy.STREAMING;
+        }
+    }
+
+    /**
+     * 计算分片数
+     */
+    public int calcTotalChunks(long fileSize) {
+        if (fileSize <= 0) return 0;
+        long chunk = props.getChunkSize();
+        return (int) Math.ceil((double) fileSize / chunk);
+    }
+
+    public long getChunkSize() {
+        return props.getChunkSize();
+    }
+}

+package com.minio.fileservice.service.validator;
+
+import com.minio.fileservice.config.FileRuleProperties;
+import com.minio.fileservice.enums.FileCategory;
+import com.minio.fileservice.util.FileSizeUtil;
+import com.minio.fileservice.util.FileTypeUtil;
+import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
+import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
+
+import java.util.Arrays;
+import java.util.Set;
+import java.util.stream.Collectors;
+
+/**
+ * 文件格式校验规则
+ * 根据文件分类检查扩展名是否在白名单内
+ */
+@Component
+@RequiredArgsConstructor
+public class FileFormatRule implements FileValidationRule {
+
+    private final FileRuleProperties ruleProperties;
+
+    @Override
+    public String validate(String fileName, long fileSize, String mimeType) {
+        FileCategory category = FileTypeUtil.getCategory(fileName, mimeType);
+        String ext = FileTypeUtil.getExtension(fileName);
+
+        // 未分类文件通过（进入 unclassified bucket）
+        if (category == FileCategory.UNCLASSIFIED) {
+            return null;
+        }
+
+        FileRuleProperties.CategoryRule rule = ruleProperties.getRuleFor(category);
+        if (rule == null || rule.getAllowedExtensions() == null || rule.getAllowedExtensions().isBlank()) {
+            return null; // 无格式限制
+        }
+
+        Set<String> allowed = Arrays.stream(rule.getAllowedExtensions().split(","))
+                .map(String::trim)
+                .map(String::toLowerCase)
+                .collect(Collectors.toSet());
+
+        if (!allowed.isEmpty() && !allowed.contains(ext)) {
+            return String.format(
+                "文件 [%s] 格式不支持：.%s 不在 %s 类型允许的格式列表中（允许: %s）",
+                fileName, ext, category.getCode(), rule.getAllowedExtensions()
+            );
+        }
+        return null;
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public String getRuleName() {
+        return "文件格式校验";
+    }
+}

+package com.minio.fileservice.service.validator;
+
+import com.minio.fileservice.config.FileRuleProperties;
+import com.minio.fileservice.enums.FileCategory;
+import com.minio.fileservice.util.FileSizeUtil;
+import com.minio.fileservice.util.FileTypeUtil;
+import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
+import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
+
+/**
+ * 文件大小校验规则
+ * 根据文件分类检查是否超出大小上限
+ */
+@Component
+@RequiredArgsConstructor
+public class FileSizeRule implements FileValidationRule {
+
+    private final FileRuleProperties ruleProperties;
+
+    @Override
+    public String validate(String fileName, long fileSize, String mimeType) {
+        FileCategory category = FileTypeUtil.getCategory(fileName, mimeType);
+        FileRuleProperties.CategoryRule rule = ruleProperties.getRuleFor(category);
+
+        if (rule == null) {
+            return null;
+        }
+
+        long maxBytes = rule.getMaxSizeBytes();
+        if (fileSize > maxBytes) {
+            return String.format(
+                "文件 [%s] 超出大小限制：当前 %s，%s 类型最大允许 %s",
+                fileName,
+                FileSizeUtil.format(fileSize),
+                category.getCode(),
+                FileSizeUtil.format(maxBytes)
+            );
+        }
+        return null;
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public String getRuleName() {
+        return "文件大小校验";
+    }
+}

+package com.minio.fileservice.service.validator;
+
+import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
+import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
+import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
+
+import java.util.ArrayList;
+import java.util.List;
+
+/**
+ * 文件校验引擎
+ * 按顺序执行所有注册的校验规则，收集全部错误后统一返回
+ * （不在第一个错误时短路，确保前端能一次性看到所有问题）
+ */
+@Slf4j
+@Service
+@RequiredArgsConstructor
+public class FileValidationEngine {
+
+    private final List<FileValidationRule> rules;
+
+    /**
+     * 执行全部校验规则
+     * @return 校验结果列表，空列表表示全部通过
+     */
+    public List<String> validate(String fileName, long fileSize, String mimeType) {
+        List<String> errors = new ArrayList<>();
+        for (FileValidationRule rule : rules) {
+            String error = rule.validate(fileName, fileSize, mimeType);
+            if (error != null && !error.isBlank()) {
+                log.debug("[{}] 校验失败: {}", rule.getRuleName(), error);
+                errors.add(error);
+            }
+        }
+        return errors;
+    }
+
+    /**
+     * 快速校验：遇到第一个错误即返回（性能优先模式）
+     * @return null 表示通过；非 null 为第一条错误信息
+     */
+    public String validateFast(String fileName, long fileSize, String mimeType) {
+        for (FileValidationRule rule : rules) {
+            String error = rule.validate(fileName, fileSize, mimeType);
+            if (error != null && !error.isBlank()) {
+                return error;
+            }
+        }
+        return null;
+    }
+}

+package com.minio.fileservice.service.validator;
+
+import java.util.List;
+
+/**
+ * 文件校验规则接口（Strategy 模式）
+ * 每个实现类负责一种校验维度
+ */
+public interface FileValidationRule {
+
+    /**
+     * 执行校验
+     * @param fileName  文件名
+     * @param fileSize  文件字节数
+     * @param mimeType  MIME 类型（可能为 null）
+     * @return          校验通过返回 null；不通过返回错误信息
+     */
+    String validate(String fileName, long fileSize, String mimeType);
+
+    /**
+     * 规则描述（日志/调试用）
+     */
+    String getRuleName();
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,44 @@
+package com.minio.fileservice.util;
+
+/**
+ * 文件大小格式化工具
+ * 规则（需求第三条）：
+ *   < 1 MB  → 以 KB 展示
+ *   ≥ 1 MB  → 以 MB 展示
+ *   ≥ 1 GB  → 以 GB 展示
+ */
+public final class FileSizeUtil {
+
+    private static final long KB = 1024L;
+    private static final long MB = 1024L * KB;
+    private static final long GB = 1024L * MB;
+
+    private FileSizeUtil() {}
+
+    /**
+     * 将字节数格式化为人类可读字符串
+     * @param bytes 文件字节数
+     * @return 如 "512 KB" / "3.5 MB" / "2.1 GB"
+     */
+    public static String format(long bytes) {
+        if (bytes < 0) return "未知";
+        if (bytes < MB) {
+            // < 1 MB，按 KB 展示（保留 0 位小数）
+            double kb = (double) bytes / KB;
+            return String.format("%.0f KB", kb < 1 ? 1.0 : kb);
+        } else if (bytes < GB) {
+            // ≥ 1 MB，按 MB 展示（保留 1 位小数）
+            return String.format("%.1f MB", (double) bytes / MB);
+        } else {
+            // ≥ 1 GB，按 GB 展示（保留 2 位小数）
+            return String.format("%.2f GB", (double) bytes / GB);
+        }
+    }
+
+    /**
+     * 将字节数格式化，附带原始字节数括号提示
+     */
+    public static String formatWithBytes(long bytes) {
+        return format(bytes) + " (" + bytes + " B)";
+    }
+}

+package com.minio.fileservice.util;
+
+import com.minio.fileservice.enums.FileCategory;
+
+import java.util.Map;
+import java.util.Set;
+
+/**
+ * 文件类型判断工具
+ * MIME 优先，扩展名 fallback
+ */
+public final class FileTypeUtil {
+
+    private FileTypeUtil() {}
+
+    /** 扩展名 → 分类 映射 */
+    private static final Map<String, FileCategory> EXT_MAP = Map.ofEntries(
+            // 视频
+            Map.entry("mp4",  FileCategory.VIDEO),
+            Map.entry("avi",  FileCategory.VIDEO),
+            Map.entry("mov",  FileCategory.VIDEO),
+            Map.entry("flv",  FileCategory.VIDEO),
+            Map.entry("wmv",  FileCategory.VIDEO),
+            Map.entry("rmvb", FileCategory.VIDEO),
+            Map.entry("webm", FileCategory.VIDEO),
+            Map.entry("mpga", FileCategory.VIDEO),
+            // 音频
+            Map.entry("wav",  FileCategory.AUDIO),
+            Map.entry("ogg",  FileCategory.AUDIO),
+            Map.entry("mp3",  FileCategory.AUDIO),
+            Map.entry("aac",  FileCategory.AUDIO),
+            Map.entry("m4a",  FileCategory.AUDIO),
+            // 图片
+            Map.entry("png",  FileCategory.IMAGE),
+            Map.entry("jpg",  FileCategory.IMAGE),
+            Map.entry("jpeg", FileCategory.IMAGE),
+            Map.entry("gif",  FileCategory.IMAGE),
+            Map.entry("svg",  FileCategory.IMAGE),
+            Map.entry("webp", FileCategory.IMAGE),
+            Map.entry("bmp",  FileCategory.IMAGE),
+            // 文档
+            Map.entry("pdf",  FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("doc",  FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("docx", FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("ppt",  FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("pptx", FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("ofd",  FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("csv",  FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("xls",  FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("xlsx", FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("wps",  FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("xml",  FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("html", FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("htm",  FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("txt",  FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("md",   FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("json", FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("log",  FileCategory.DOCUMENT)
+    );
+
+    /** MIME → 分类 映射 */
+    private static final Map<String, FileCategory> MIME_MAP = Map.ofEntries(
+            Map.entry("video/mp4",             FileCategory.VIDEO),
+            Map.entry("video/mpeg",            FileCategory.VIDEO),
+            Map.entry("video/quicktime",       FileCategory.VIDEO),
+            Map.entry("video/x-msvideo",       FileCategory.VIDEO),
+            Map.entry("video/webm",            FileCategory.VIDEO),
+            Map.entry("video/x-flv",           FileCategory.VIDEO),
+            Map.entry("video/x-ms-wmv",        FileCategory.VIDEO),
+            Map.entry("audio/mpeg",            FileCategory.AUDIO),
+            Map.entry("audio/wav",             FileCategory.AUDIO),
+            Map.entry("audio/ogg",             FileCategory.AUDIO),
+            Map.entry("audio/flac",            FileCategory.AUDIO),
+            Map.entry("audio/aac",             FileCategory.AUDIO),
+            Map.entry("audio/mp4",             FileCategory.AUDIO),
+            Map.entry("audio/x-m4a",           FileCategory.AUDIO),
+            Map.entry("image/jpeg",            FileCategory.IMAGE),
+            Map.entry("image/png",             FileCategory.IMAGE),
+            Map.entry("image/gif",             FileCategory.IMAGE),
+            Map.entry("image/webp",            FileCategory.IMAGE),
+            Map.entry("image/svg+xml",         FileCategory.IMAGE),
+            Map.entry("image/bmp",             FileCategory.IMAGE),
+            Map.entry("application/pdf",       FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("application/msword",    FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document", FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("application/vnd.ms-excel",  FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet", FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("application/vnd.ms-powerpoint", FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation", FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("text/plain",            FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("text/csv",              FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("text/html",             FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("text/markdown",         FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("application/json",      FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("application/xml",       FileCategory.DOCUMENT),
+            Map.entry("text/xml",              FileCategory.DOCUMENT)
+    );
+
+    /**
+     * 根据文件名 + MIME 判断分类（MIME 优先，扩展名 fallback）
+     */
+    public static FileCategory getCategory(String fileName, String mimeType) {
+        if (mimeType != null && !mimeType.isBlank()) {
+            String mime = mimeType.toLowerCase().trim();
+            FileCategory cat = MIME_MAP.get(mime);
+            if (cat != null) return cat;
+        }
+        String ext = getExtension(fileName);
+        return EXT_MAP.getOrDefault(ext, FileCategory.UNCLASSIFIED);
+    }
+
+    /**
+     * 获取文件扩展名（小写，不含点）
+     */
+    public static String getExtension(String fileName) {
+        if (fileName == null || !fileName.contains(".")) return "";
+        return fileName.substring(fileName.lastIndexOf('.') + 1).toLowerCase().trim();
+    }
+}

===================================================================
--- file-service/src/main/resources/db-init-full.sql	
+++ file-service/src/main/resources/db-init-full.sql	
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+-- ============================================================
+-- upload_service 数据库完整初始化脚本
+-- 在服务器上执行：
+--   psql -h localhost -U postgres -d upload_service -f /tmp/init_upload_service.sql
+-- ============================================================
+
+-- ── 主表 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS file_upload_record (
+    id              BIGSERIAL       PRIMARY KEY,
+    file_id         VARCHAR(64)     NOT NULL UNIQUE,
+    file_name       VARCHAR(512)    NOT NULL,
+    storage_path    VARCHAR(1024),
+    file_size       BIGINT          NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+    file_type       VARCHAR(32),
+    mime_type       VARCHAR(128),
+    extension       VARCHAR(32),
+    bucket          VARCHAR(128),
+    parent_id       BIGINT          REFERENCES file_upload_record(id),
+    node_type       VARCHAR(16)     NOT NULL DEFAULT 'FILE'
+                        CHECK (node_type IN ('FILE','FOLDER')),
+    upload_status   VARCHAR(32)     NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING'
+                        CHECK (upload_status IN (
+                            'PENDING','UPLOADING','PAUSED',
+                            'SUCCESS','FAILED','CANCELLED')),
+    upload_strategy VARCHAR(32),
+    error_message   TEXT,
+    upload_id       VARCHAR(256),
+    total_chunks    INT             DEFAULT 0,
+    uploaded_chunks INT             DEFAULT 0,
+    chunk_size      BIGINT          DEFAULT 0,
+    uploaded_bytes  BIGINT          DEFAULT 0,
+    upload_percent  NUMERIC(5,2)    DEFAULT 0.00,
+    username        VARCHAR(128)    NOT NULL,
+    url             VARCHAR(1024),
+    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ     NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
+    updated_at      TIMESTAMPTZ     NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
+);
+
+-- ── 分片明细表（断点续传核心）──────────────────────────────────
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS file_chunk_record (
+    id          BIGSERIAL   PRIMARY KEY,
+    file_id     VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
+    chunk_index INT         NOT NULL,
+    chunk_size  BIGINT      DEFAULT 0,
+    etag        VARCHAR(128),
+    status      VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SUCCESS',
+    uploaded_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
+    UNIQUE (file_id, chunk_index)
+);
+
+-- ── 索引 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fur_username   ON file_upload_record(username);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fur_status     ON file_upload_record(upload_status);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fur_created    ON file_upload_record(created_at DESC);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fur_bucket     ON file_upload_record(bucket);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fcr_file_id    ON file_chunk_record(file_id);
+
+-- ── 自动更新 updated_at 触发器 ────────────────────────────────
+CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
+RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
+BEGIN
+    NEW.updated_at = NOW();
+    RETURN NEW;
+END;
+$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
+
+DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_fur_updated_at ON file_upload_record;
+CREATE TRIGGER trg_fur_updated_at
+    BEFORE UPDATE ON file_upload_record
+    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();
+
+-- ── 注释 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+COMMENT ON TABLE  file_upload_record IS '文件上传记录主表';
+COMMENT ON TABLE  file_chunk_record  IS '分片上传明细表，断点续传依赖';
+COMMENT ON COLUMN file_upload_record.upload_id     IS 'MinIO Multipart Upload ID';
+COMMENT ON COLUMN file_upload_record.upload_percent IS '进度: uploaded_bytes/file_size*100';
+COMMENT ON COLUMN file_chunk_record.etag           IS 'MinIO upload_part 返回的 ETag';

--- file-service/src/main/resources/db-init.sql

@@ -0,0 +1,107 @@
+-- ============================================================
+-- 文件上传服务 - PostgreSQL 数据库初始化脚本
+-- 数据库: upload_service
+-- ============================================================
+
+-- 创建数据库（如未存在手动执行）
+-- CREATE DATABASE upload_service;
+
+-- ── 文件上传记录主表 ──────────────────────────────────────────
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS file_upload_record (
+    -- 主键
+    id                  BIGSERIAL       PRIMARY KEY,
+    file_id             VARCHAR(64)     NOT NULL UNIQUE,    -- UUID，前端唯一标识
+
+    -- 文件基本信息
+    file_name           VARCHAR(512)    NOT NULL,           -- 原始文件名
+    storage_path        VARCHAR(1024),                      -- MinIO 存储路径 (bucket/key)
+    file_size           BIGINT          NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, -- 文件字节数
+    file_type           VARCHAR(32),                        -- 分类: video/audio/image/document/unclassified
+    mime_type           VARCHAR(128),                       -- MIME 类型
+    extension           VARCHAR(32),                        -- 文件扩展名（不含点）
+    bucket              VARCHAR(128),                       -- 目标 MinIO Bucket
+
+    -- 层级关系（支持文件夹）
+    parent_id           BIGINT          REFERENCES file_upload_record(id),
+    node_type           VARCHAR(16)     NOT NULL DEFAULT 'FILE'
+                            CHECK (node_type IN ('FILE', 'FOLDER')),
+
+    -- 上传状态
+    upload_status       VARCHAR(32)     NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING'
+                            CHECK (upload_status IN (
+                                'PENDING',      -- 待上传
+                                'UPLOADING',    -- 上传中
+                                'PAUSED',       -- 已暂停
+                                'SUCCESS',      -- 上传成功
+                                'FAILED',       -- 上传失败
+                                'CANCELLED'     -- 已取消
+                            )),
+    upload_strategy     VARCHAR(32),                        -- 使用的上传策略
+    error_message       TEXT,                               -- 失败原因
+
+    -- 分片上传专用字段
+    upload_id           VARCHAR(256),                       -- MinIO Multipart Upload ID
+    total_chunks        INT             DEFAULT 0,          -- 总分片数
+    uploaded_chunks     INT             DEFAULT 0,          -- 已上传分片数
+    chunk_size          BIGINT          DEFAULT 0,          -- 每片大小(字节)
+
+    -- 进度追踪
+    uploaded_bytes      BIGINT          DEFAULT 0,          -- 已上传字节数
+    upload_percent      NUMERIC(5, 2)   DEFAULT 0.00,       -- 上传百分比 (0.00 ~ 100.00)
+
+    -- 用户信息
+    username            VARCHAR(128)    NOT NULL,           -- 上传用户
+    url                 VARCHAR(1024),                      -- MinIO 访问 URL
+
+    -- 时间戳
+    created_at          TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE    NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
+    updated_at          TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE    NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
+);
+
+-- ── 分片记录表（断点续传用）──────────────────────────────────
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS file_chunk_record (
+    id              BIGSERIAL   PRIMARY KEY,
+    file_id         VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,                   -- 关联 file_upload_record.file_id
+    chunk_index     INT         NOT NULL,                   -- 分片序号 (1-based)
+    chunk_size      BIGINT      NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,         -- 本片实际字节数
+    etag            VARCHAR(128),                           -- MinIO 返回的 ETag
+    status          VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING'
+                        CHECK (status IN ('PENDING', 'UPLOADED', 'FAILED')),
+    uploaded_at     TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
+    created_at      TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
+
+    UNIQUE (file_id, chunk_index)
+);
+
+-- ── 索引 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fur_username       ON file_upload_record (username);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fur_status         ON file_upload_record (upload_status);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fur_created_at     ON file_upload_record (created_at DESC);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fur_parent_id      ON file_upload_record (parent_id);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fcr_file_id        ON file_chunk_record  (file_id);
+
+-- ── 自动更新 updated_at 触发器 ────────────────────────────────
+CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
+RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
+BEGIN
+    NEW.updated_at = NOW();
+    RETURN NEW;
+END;
+$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
+
+DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_fur_updated_at ON file_upload_record;
+CREATE TRIGGER trg_fur_updated_at
+    BEFORE UPDATE ON file_upload_record
+    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();
+
+-- ── 注释 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+COMMENT ON TABLE  file_upload_record IS '文件上传记录表';
+COMMENT ON COLUMN file_upload_record.file_id          IS '前端传入的UUID，用于断点续传标识';
+COMMENT ON COLUMN file_upload_record.upload_status    IS '上传状态: PENDING/UPLOADING/PAUSED/SUCCESS/FAILED/CANCELLED';
+COMMENT ON COLUMN file_upload_record.upload_strategy  IS '使用的策略: DIRECT/SIMPLE/MULTIPART/RESUMABLE/STREAMING';
+COMMENT ON COLUMN file_upload_record.upload_id        IS 'MinIO Multipart Upload ID，分片上传时使用';
+COMMENT ON COLUMN file_upload_record.upload_percent   IS '上传进度百分比: 已上传字节数/总字节数*100';
+
+COMMENT ON TABLE  file_chunk_record  IS '分片上传记录表，用于断点续传';
+COMMENT ON COLUMN file_chunk_record.chunk_index       IS '分片序号，从1开始';
+COMMENT ON COLUMN file_chunk_record.etag              IS 'MinIO upload_part 返回的ETag，complete时需要';

+    "file": "migrate_to_pg.py",

===================================================================
--- migrate_to_pg.py	
+++ migrate_to_pg.py	
@@ -0,0 +1,96 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env python3
+"""
+SQLite → PostgreSQL 数据迁移工具
+把本地 uploads.db 的上传记录和分片记录迁移到远程 PG
+"""
+import sqlite3
+import psycopg2
+import os
+
+# SQLite 路径
+SQLITE_DB = r"C:\Projs\Minio\upload-app\uploads.db"
+
+# PG 连接配置（与 app.py 保持一致）
+PG_HOST = os.environ.get("PG_HOST", "8.148.239.23")
+PG_PORT = int(os.environ.get("PG_PORT", "5432"))
+PG_DB   = os.environ.get("PG_DB",   "upload_service")
+PG_USER = os.environ.get("PG_USER", "postgres")
+PG_PASS = os.environ.get("PG_PASS", "123456")
+
+def migrate():
+    print("[1/4] 连接 SQLite...")
+    sqlite_conn = sqlite3.connect(SQLITE_DB)

+                r["parent_id"], r["node_type"], r["upload_status"], r["upload_strategy"],

+            ))

+        except Exception as e:

+    pg_conn.commit()
+    print(f"  ✅ 迁移 {migrated}/{len(rows)} 条主记录")
+
+    print("[4/4] 迁移 file_chunk_record...")
+    chunks = sqlite_conn.execute("SELECT * FROM file_chunk_record").fetchall()

+async function loadUnfinishedTasks() {
+  try {
+    // 分别拉取 PAUSED 和 UPLOADING 状态
+    const [pausedResp, uploadingResp] = await Promise.all([
+      fetch("/api/records?status=PAUSED"),
+      fetch("/api/records?status=UPLOADING"),
+    ]);
+    const pausedData = await pausedResp.json();
+    const uploadingData = await uploadingResp.json();
+    const records = [...(pausedData.records || []), ...(uploadingData.records || [])];
+
+    if (records.length === 0) return;
+
+    for (const r of records) {
+      // 避免重复加入
+      if (fileQueue.find(q => q.fileId === r.fileId || q.taskId === r.fileId)) continue;

+        id: Date.now() + Math.random(),

+        placeholderName: r.fileName,  // 显示文件名
+        placeholderSize: r.fileSize,  // 显示大小

+        limit: getLimit(cat),

+  } catch (e) {

+  }

 async function startUpload() {
   // 先取消所有冲突状态，重新检查
   fileQueue.forEach(q => { if (q.status === "conflict") q.status = "pending"; });

   // 检查同名冲突
   const pendingFiles = fileQueue.filter(q => (q.status === "pending" || q.status === "force_upload") && q.file.size <= q.limit);
   if (pendingFiles.length === 0) {
     fileQueue.forEach(q => {
       if (q.status === "pending" && q.file.size > q.limit) {
         q.status = "rejected";
         q.reason = `超过 ${(q.limit/1024/1024).toFixed(0)}MB 限制`;
       }
     });
     renderQueue();
     return;
   }
 
   // 检查同名冲突（跳过已由用户确认替换的文件）
   const toCheck = pendingFiles.filter(q => q.status !== "force_upload");
   if (toCheck.length > 0) {
     try {
       const r = await fetch("/api/upload/check-conflict", {
         method: "POST",
         headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
         body: JSON.stringify({
           files: toCheck.map(q => ({ bucket: q.bucket, filename: q.file.name }))
         }),
       });
       const data = await r.json();
       const conflictNames = new Set(data.conflicts || []);
 
       if (conflictNames.size > 0) {
         fileQueue.forEach(q => {
           if (q.status === "pending" && conflictNames.has(q.file.name)) {
             q.status = "conflict";
           }
         });
         renderQueue();
         return;
       }
     } catch(e) {
       console.error("冲突检查失败:", e);
     }
   }
 
   // 无冲突，直接上传
   await doUpload();
 }
 
 function resolveConflict(idx, action) {
   const q = fileQueue[idx];

   } else {
     fileQueue.splice(idx, 1);
   }
   renderQueue();
 
   if (!fileQueue.some(q => q.status === "conflict")) {
     startUpload();
   }
 }

 async function importExternalSelected() {
   if (extChecked.size === 0) { alert("请勾选要导入的文件"); return; }
 
   const keys = Array.from(extChecked);
   const extList = document.getElementById("extList");
 
   // 显示初始进度条
   extList.innerHTML = `
     <div class="import-progress">
       <div class="import-progress-bar">
         <div class="import-progress-fill" id="importFill" style="width:0%"></div>
       </div>
       <div class="import-progress-text" id="importText">正在连接外部源，计算文件大小...</div>
       <div class="import-progress-speed" id="importSpeed"></div>
     </div>`;
 
   try {
     const r = await fetch("/api/import/external/copy", {
       method: "POST",
       headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },

     });
     const data = await r.json();
     if (data.error) { alert(data.error); listExternal(extCurrentPrefix); return; }
 
     const taskId = data.task_id;
     const totalMB = (data.total_bytes / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1);
 
     const poll = setInterval(async () => {
       try {
         const pr = await fetch(`/api/import/external/progress/${taskId}`);
         const p = await pr.json();
 
         const pct = p.total_bytes > 0 ? Math.round((p.done_bytes / p.total_bytes) * 100) : 0;
         const transferDone = p.total_bytes > 0 && p.done_bytes >= p.total_bytes;
         const speedStr = transferDone ? "0 KB/s" : formatSpeed(p.speed);
         const doneMB = (p.done_bytes / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1);
 
         const fill = document.getElementById("importFill");
         const text = document.getElementById("importText");
         const speed = document.getElementById("importSpeed");
         if (!fill) { clearInterval(poll); return; }  // DOM 已变化则停
 
         fill.style.width = pct + "%";
 
         if (transferDone || p.status === "done" || p.status === "error") {
           clearInterval(poll);
           if (p.status === "error") {
             text.textContent = "导入出错";
           } else {
             text.textContent = "导入完成";
             fill.style.width = "100%";
           }
           speed.textContent = "";
           setTimeout(() => {
             extChecked.clear();
             listExternal(extCurrentPrefix);
             loadFiles();
           }, 2000);
           return;
         }
 
         let txt = `${doneMB}/${totalMB} MB (${pct}%)`;
         if (p.current_file) {
           const fileFinishing = p.current_file_total > 0 && p.current_file_done >= p.current_file_total;
           if (fileFinishing) {
             txt += ` — 正在保存到 MinIO...`;
           } else {
             const fileDone = (p.current_file_done / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1);
             const fileTotal = (p.current_file_total / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1);
             txt += ` — 当前: ${p.current_file} ${fileDone}/${fileTotal}MB`;
           }
         }
         text.textContent = txt;
         speed.textContent = `速度: ${speedStr}`;
       } catch(e) {
         clearInterval(poll);
       }
     }, 500);
   } catch(e) {
     alert("启动导入失败: " + (e.message || e));
     listExternal(extCurrentPrefix);
   }
 }
 
 function formatSpeed(bytesPerSec) {
   if (!bytesPerSec || bytesPerSec < 1024) return "0 KB/s";
   if (bytesPerSec < 1024 * 1024) return (bytesPerSec / 1024).toFixed(0) + " KB/s";
   return (bytesPerSec / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1) + " MB/s";
 }

   const keys = Array.from(hdfsChecked);

   hdfsList.innerHTML = `
     <div class="import-progress">
       <div class="import-progress-bar">
         <div class="import-progress-fill" id="hdfsFill" style="width:0%"></div>
       </div>
       <div class="import-progress-text" id="hdfsText">正在连接 HDFS，计算文件大小...</div>
       <div class="import-progress-speed" id="hdfsSpeed"></div>
     </div>`;
 
   try {
     const r = await fetch("/api/import/external/copy", {
       method: "POST",
       headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
       body: JSON.stringify({
         source_type: "hdfs",
         namenode: hdfsConfig.namenode,
         user: hdfsConfig.user,
         password: hdfsConfig.password,
         path: hdfsCurrentPath,
         keys: keys,
       }),
     });
     const data = await r.json();
     if (data.error) { alert(data.error); listHdfs(hdfsCurrentPath); return; }
 
     const taskId = data.task_id;
     const totalMB = (data.total_bytes / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1);
 
     const poll = setInterval(async () => {
       try {
         const pr = await fetch(`/api/import/external/progress/${taskId}`);
         const p = await pr.json();
 
         const pct = p.total_bytes > 0 ? Math.round((p.done_bytes / p.total_bytes) * 100) : 0;
         const transferDone = p.total_bytes > 0 && p.done_bytes >= p.total_bytes;
         const speedStr = transferDone ? "0 KB/s" : formatSpeed(p.speed);
         const doneMB = (p.done_bytes / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1);
 
         const fill = document.getElementById("hdfsFill");
         const text = document.getElementById("hdfsText");
         const speed = document.getElementById("hdfsSpeed");
         if (!fill) { clearInterval(poll); return; }
 
         fill.style.width = pct + "%";
 
         if (transferDone || p.status === "done" || p.status === "error") {
           clearInterval(poll);
           if (p.status === "error") {
             text.textContent = "导入出错";
           } else {
             text.textContent = "导入完成";
             fill.style.width = "100%";
           }
           speed.textContent = "";
           setTimeout(() => {
             hdfsChecked.clear();
             listHdfs(hdfsCurrentPath);
             loadFiles();
           }, 2000);
           return;
         }
 
         let txt = `${doneMB}/${totalMB} MB (${pct}%)`;
         if (p.current_file) {
           const fileFinishing = p.current_file_total > 0 && p.current_file_done >= p.current_file_total;
           if (fileFinishing) {
             txt += ` — 正在保存到 MinIO...`;
           } else {
             const fileDone = (p.current_file_done / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1);
             const fileTotal = (p.current_file_total / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1);
             txt += ` — 当前: ${p.current_file} ${fileDone}/${fileTotal}MB`;
           }
         }
         text.textContent = txt;
         speed.textContent = `速度: ${speedStr}`;
       } catch(e) {
         clearInterval(poll);
       }
     }, 500);
   } catch(e) {
     alert("启动导入失败: " + (e.message || e));
     listHdfs(hdfsCurrentPath);
   }
 }
 
+// ── Flask 上传暂停 / 恢复 ──────────────────────────────────────────
+function abortFlaskUpload(idx) {
+  const q = fileQueue[idx];
+  if (!q || !q.xhr) return;
+  const taskId = q.taskId; // Flask 返回的 task_id
+  q.xhr.abort(); // 触发 xhr.onabort → status = paused
+  // 通知后端写 PG PAUSED
+  if (taskId) {
+    fetch(`/api/upload/notify-pause/${taskId}`, { method: "POST" }).catch(() => {});
+  }
+}
+
+function resumeFlaskUpload(idx) {
+  const q = fileQueue[idx];
+  if (!q) return;
+  const taskId = q.taskId;
+  // 通知后端写 PG UPLOADING
+  if (taskId) {
+    fetch(`/api/upload/notify-resume/${taskId}`, { method: "POST" }).catch(() => {});
+  }
+  q.status = "pending";
+  q.progress = 0;
+  q.uploadMode = "flask";
+  q.xhr = null;
+  renderQueue();
+  uploadSingle(q).then(() => {
+    renderResults();
+    loadFiles();
+  });
+}
+
 // ── Start ──
 document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", init);

--- static/upload-chunked.js	
+++ static/upload-chunked.js

+/**
+ * upload-chunked.js
+ * 分片上传 + 暂停/恢复/断点续传（Flask 后端版本）
+ *
+ * 流程：
+ *   1. /api/upload/init  → 创建 MinIO multipart upload，返回 uid + 已上传分片号
+ *   2. 循环上传每个未上传的分片 → /api/upload/chunk
+ *   3. 全部完成 → /api/upload/complete 合并
+ *
+ * 状态：
+ *   pending → uploading → (paused) → uploading → ok
+ *                       ↘ error (可重试)
+ */
+
+// 分片大小：5 MB（MinIO 最小 part size = 5MB，最后一片可小于）
+const CHUNK_SIZE = 5 * 1024 * 1024;
+
+/**
+ * 主入口：分片上传单个文件，支持断点续传
+ * 替代原来的 uploadSingle()
+ *
+ * @param {Object} q - 队列项，需要 q.file、q.bucket
+ * @returns {Promise<void>}
+ */
+async function uploadSingleChunked(q) {
+  const file = q.file;
+  const totalChunks = Math.ceil(file.size / CHUNK_SIZE);
+
+  // 暂停控制信号，全程贯穿
+  q._paused = false;
+  q._cancelled = false;
+
+  // ── Step 1: 初始化 / 恢复 ──────────────────────────────────────
+  // 判断是否为"恢复"场景：有 taskId 且有进度 → 此前传过一部分，需要展示恢复提示
+  const isResuming = !!q.taskId && (q.progress || 0) > 0;
+
+  // 进入 init 前先切到 "restoring" 状态：
+  // /api/upload/init 内部会查 PG + s3.list_parts 验证 multipart 存活，
+  // 跨网 RTT 可能 1-2 秒，期间 UI 应展示"恢复中"而非 0%
+  // 若 q.progress 已有值（来自 paused 状态），保留它做视觉过渡
+  if (isResuming) {
+    q.status = "restoring";
+    renderQueue();
+  }
+  const restoreStartTs = Date.now();
+
+  let uid, uploadedChunks;
+
+  // 所有路径都走 /init，后端三层查找自动处理恢复逻辑：
+  //   - 有内存会话 → 返回已上传分片
+  //   - 有 DB 记录（包括服务器重启后）→ 恢复到内存并返回
+  //   - 没有 → 新建会话
+  try {
+    const r = await fetch("/api/upload/init", {
+      method: "POST",
+      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
+      body: JSON.stringify({
+        filename: file.name,
+        mime: file.type || "application/octet-stream",
+        bucket: q.bucket,
+        file_size: file.size,
+        total_chunks: totalChunks,
+      }),
+    });
+    const data = await r.json();
+    if (data.error) {
+      q.status = "error";
+      q.error = data.error;
+      renderQueue();
+      return;
+    }
+    uid = data.uid;
+    q.taskId = uid;
+    uploadedChunks = new Set(data.uploaded_chunks || []);
+
+    if (data.resumed) {
+      // 根据已传分片数预填 q.progress，让 UI 立刻显示真实的恢复进度
+      const restoredPct = totalChunks > 0
+        ? Math.min(100, Math.round((uploadedChunks.size / totalChunks) * 100))
+        : 0;
+      q.progress = restoredPct;
+      console.log(`[断点续传] 从第 ${uploadedChunks.size + 1} 片继续 (${restoredPct}%)，来源: ${data.source}`);
+    }
+  } catch (e) {
+    q.status = "error";
+    q.error = "初始化失败: " + (e.message || e);
+    renderQueue();
+    return;
+  }
+
+  // 恢复场景：确保 "restoring" 至少展示 800ms，避免 init 命中内存会话时（几十 ms 返回）
+  // UI 瞬间从 paused→uploading 闪过，用户看不到"正在恢复上传"提示
+  if (isResuming) {
+    const elapsed = Date.now() - restoreStartTs;
+    const minVisible = 800;
+    if (elapsed < minVisible) {
+      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, minVisible - elapsed));
+    }
+  }
+
+  q.totalChunks = totalChunks;
+  q.uploadedChunks = Array.from(uploadedChunks);
+  // init 完成，切到正常上传中（保留刚才算出的 q.progress 百分比）
+  q.status = "uploading";
+  renderQueue();
+
+  // ── Step 2: 逐片上传 ───────────────────────────────────────────
+  const startTime = Date.now();
+  let bytesUploaded = uploadedChunks.size * CHUNK_SIZE;
+  if (bytesUploaded > file.size) bytesUploaded = (uploadedChunks.size - 1) * CHUNK_SIZE + (file.size % CHUNK_SIZE || CHUNK_SIZE);
+
+  for (let partNum = 1; partNum <= totalChunks; partNum++) {
+    // 暂停检查
+    if (q._paused) {
+      q.status = "paused";
+      renderQueue();
+      fetch(`/api/upload/notify-pause/${uid}`, { method: "POST" }).catch(() => {});
+      return; // 退出循环，等待恢复
+    }
+    if (q._cancelled) {
+      q.status = "cancelled";
+      renderQueue();
+      return;
+    }
+    // 跳过已上传的分片（断点续传）
+    if (uploadedChunks.has(partNum)) continue;
+
+    // 切出当前分片
+    const start = (partNum - 1) * CHUNK_SIZE;
+    const end = Math.min(start + CHUNK_SIZE, file.size);
+    const chunk = file.slice(start, end);
+
+    const form = new FormData();
+    form.append("uid", uid);
+    form.append("part", partNum);
+    form.append("chunk", chunk, file.name + ".part" + partNum);
+
+    // 用 XHR 以便挂到 q.xhr 上、便于暂停立刻 abort
+    const result = await new Promise((resolve) => {
+      const xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
+      q.xhr = xhr;
+      xhr.open("POST", "/api/upload/chunk");
+      xhr.onload = () => {
+        try {
+          const data = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText);
+          if (data.error) {
+            resolve({ error: data.error });
+          } else {
+            resolve({ ok: true, data });
+          }
+        } catch (e) {
+          resolve({ error: "响应解析失败" });
+        }
+      };
+      xhr.onerror = () => resolve({ error: "网络错误" });
+      xhr.onabort = () => resolve({ aborted: true });
+      xhr.send(form);
+    });
+
+    q.xhr = null;
+
+    if (result.aborted) {
+      // 被暂停或取消
+      q.status = q._cancelled ? "error" : "paused";
+      if (q._paused) {
+        fetch(`/api/upload/notify-pause/${uid}`, { method: "POST" }).catch(() => {});
+      }
+      renderQueue();
+      return;
+    }
+    if (result.error) {
+      q.status = "error";
+      q.error = result.error;
+      renderQueue();
+      return;
+    }
+
+    // 分片上传成功
+    uploadedChunks.add(partNum);
+    q.uploadedChunks = Array.from(uploadedChunks);
+    bytesUploaded += (end - start);
+
+    // 更新进度（基于实际已上传字节数）
+    q.progress = Math.round((bytesUploaded / file.size) * 100);
+    const elapsed = (Date.now() - startTime) / 1000;
+    q.speed = elapsed > 0 ? bytesUploaded / elapsed : 0;
+    renderQueue();
+  }
+
+  // ── Step 3: 合并完成 ───────────────────────────────────────────
+  q.status = "saving";
+  q.progress = 100;
+  renderQueue();
+
+  try {
+    const r = await fetch("/api/upload/complete", {
+      method: "POST",
+      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
+      body: JSON.stringify({ uid }),
+    });
+    const data = await r.json();
+    if (data.status === "ok") {
+      q.status = "ok";
+      q.progress = 100;
+      q.url = data.url;
+      renderQueue();
+    } else {
+      q.status = "error";
+      q.error = data.error || "合并失败";
+      renderQueue();
+    }
+  } catch (e) {
+    q.status = "error";
+    q.error = "完成请求失败: " + (e.message || e);
+    renderQueue();
+  }
+}
+
+/**
+ * 暂停指定队列项
+ */
+function pauseChunkedUpload(idx) {
+  const q = fileQueue[idx];
+  if (!q) return;
+  q._paused = true;
+  // 立即中断当前正在传输的分片
+  if (q.xhr) {
+    try { q.xhr.abort(); } catch (e) {}
+  }
+}
+
+/**
+ * 恢复指定队列项
+ * - 分片模式（taskId 已存在）：从未上传的分片继续
+ * - 普通模式（小文件，无 taskId）：重新整个上传
+ */
+function resumeChunkedUpload(idx) {
+  const q = fileQueue[idx];
+  if (!q) return;
+  q._paused = false;
+
+  if (q.taskId) {
+    // 分片：进入"恢复中"状态，进度保留中断时的百分比
+    // 真正的 uploading 切换发生在 uploadSingleChunked 拿到 init 响应后
+    q.status = "restoring";
+  } else {
+    // 小文件：从零重传
+    q.status = "uploading";
+    q.progress = 0;
+  }
+  renderQueue();
+
+  const promise = q.taskId
+    ? uploadSingleChunked(q)         // 分片：断点续传
+    : uploadSingle(q);                // 小文件：从头重传
+
+  promise.then(() => {
+    renderResults();
+    loadFiles();
+  });
+}
+
+// 暴露到全局（供 renderQueue 内 onclick 调用）
+window.uploadSingleChunked = uploadSingleChunked;
+window.pauseChunkedUpload = pauseChunkedUpload;
+window.resumeChunkedUpload = resumeChunkedUpload;
